channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Builders’ planks left on pavement, 24th April
item.description:
Builders planks left on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westbury Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weekly fridge is in place, 24th April
item.description:
Another fridge dumped in Swingate lane, when council will take preventive action to stop that from happening not waste money cleaning it daily
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Duncroft, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised paving slabs, 24th April
item.description:
The raised slabs caused me to trip as heading to the pedestrian crossing, (through the alleyway adjacent to Sainsbury’s) and now have 2 fractures in my wrist and elbow. I am concerned that this could have been much worse for an elderly person. I’m a fit woman in my mid 65s so hopefully will heal quickly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 24th April
item.description:
Resident has called to report flytipping ouside 72 Penge Road. Please can this be looked into and cleared.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 93, Penge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped forest bike, 24th April
item.description:
Dumped forest bike on pathway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Friends Bridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandond Forest bikes affecting particularly sighted, 24th April
item.description:
Forest are not taking measure to stop their customers abandoning their bikes on this pavement frequently used by particularly sighted visitors to the eye hospital. There is a designated rental bike parking 20m from this point.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11-43, Bath Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smell nuisance, 24th April
item.description:
Good Tings Takeaway on Tulse Hill opens the kitchen before 7am and the smell is quite horrible. A greasy fishy smell that means we can not go in the garden or open our windows. Also there is a non regulation extractor pipe that faces directly to our houses and under a residential window. I am concerned that this is unsafe a fire hazard and also unpleasant for the neighbours. I have contacted Lambeth directly but their email bounces back
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perran Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown green space, 24th April
item.description:
The green is very overgrown, this space is used regularly by all the families in the area, can you please cut and clean it. Can this please be maintained on a frequent basis so the community and families can keep using this space as we enter the warm spring and summer months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillcrest Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car constantly parking in loading bay overnight, 24th April
item.description:
This car is constantly parked in the loading bay (only 1 hour parking allowed here). It’s parked here every evening and night time. I’ve tried to use this loading bay multiple times to unpack furniture and shopping from my car but haven’t been able to due to this car being here. They seem to be using this as their personal parking space. Location: Vista Heights South Bermondsey, 227 Ilderton Road, SE15 1PR (Rollins st). This has been on going for just over one month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rollins Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose paving slab, 24th April
item.description:
Please see the photo. (This is near Melk coffee shop).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 136, Station Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin day mess, constantly, 24th April
item.description:
This is a repeated issue. It is shocking how much mess the bin collectors make. This photo shows the rubbish left behind on Perch Street after our recycling bags were collected. They chuck bags into the street, they split then they leave it all behind.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Perch Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In the back garden of number 2 st Leonard’s Square NW5 3HL, 24th April
item.description:
The tree is far too large and needs to be either removed or pruned back significantly. The council knows this, they came a month ago to do this job but then said it was bigger than they thought so they have to go and come back another time. They have not been back since. The tree is dangerous, there are falling branches and a lot of bird droppings in my garden.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Leonard's Square, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken onto stolen, 24th April
item.description:
2 days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Newbery Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tyre in the hard shoulder, 24th April
item.description:
Tyre was blown from the hard shoulder into my partners car last night which made him swerve at 60mph and nearly crash. I was driving behind and witnessed it all. It still hit his car with damage and he now doesn't want to drive for foreseeable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M11, Chigwell, Epping Forest
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Relentless dumping, 24th April
item.description:
Chairs and other household waste dumped overnight. Opposite Wallace Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haldane Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items on street outside 81 County Street, 24th April
item.description:
Household items (old rugs, black bags etc) on the street outside 81 County Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harper Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping Perch Street, 24th April
item.description:
The resident at 25 Perch Street dumps excess rubbish on the street and it is never cleared up. This is a primary school thoroughfare and the kids walking past will see this as normal. It's dangerous, unsightly and constant and urgently needs attention.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Perch Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 24th April
item.description:
Mattress dumped in the bushes. About 20foot from the sign shown. Not far from the traffic lights on the junction of sevenoaks way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is Glebe Rd the street cleaning is none existant. We never see a road cleaner in College Road or Glebe and other roads, 24th April
item.description:
We have constant rubbish in our roads on the pavements constantly. I have complained so many times . Our council taxes are high and I think this is an important part that we pay in our taxes. Please can this problem be rectified by more constant schedule for cleaning our streets. The takeaway shops in college Road dont help people just throw away there rubbish after eating the food. Also rubbish bin at the bus stop and elsewhere would help

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glebe Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter left next to wall, 24th April
item.description:
This litter has been left next to the metal gate, against the wall of 220 Dalston Lane for several months and we don't know who has left it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
